name: devmatch-visualcortex
description: DevMatch is a platform for developers and engineers to explore and connect with other developers. (frontend)
author: Rajesh Ranjan

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "🧩 VISUALCORTEX 🧩,🤖 BRAINBOX 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "npm run dev --prefix devmatch-visualcortex" "npm run dev --prefix devmatch-brainbox"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "🧩 VISUALCORTEX 🧩,🤖 BRAINBOX 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "npm run start --prefix devmatch-visualcortex" "npm run start --prefix devmatch-brainbox"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix devmatch-visualcortex && npm run build --prefix devmatch-brainbox
